MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Gilbert Jay, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Gary Chan is present.
Christina Yu-Ching Chen appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Christian Del Toro is present.
Alicia Fenrick representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 535 Jackson Street, San Francisco, CA 94133. This case settled, the trial date of September 17, 2007 is vacated.
